description_long: This is a round, woven picnic basket with a distinctive circular pattern on its flat faces, featuring alternating bands of natural beige and reddish-pink hues. The basket's body is constructed from tightly interlaced wicker or rattan, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. A single, long, flat strap made of reddish material is attached to the sides, allowing the basket to be carried over the shoulder. The sides of the basket are relatively narrow, emphasizing its cylindrical form. There is no visible lid, leaving the interior open and accessible. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for carrying food or small items during outdoor activities.
description: A round, woven picnic basket with a circular pattern and a reddish shoulder strap, open at the top with no visible lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular woven face with concentric beige and reddish-pink bands and the attached strap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow cylindrical profile and the strap draped along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the circular woven pattern and the strap extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the strap's attachment.
attribute_handle_type: Single long, flat, fixed shoulder strap made of reddish fabric or synthetic material, attached at two points on the basket's sides.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, concentric circular plain weave with alternating bands of color, creating a decorative radial effect.
